entries.description: Fire a 5-persona AI council on a high-stakes decision. Returns GO / WAIT / KILL / SPLIT recommendation with agreement score and per-voice verdicts. Built on council-diff v0.6 (Anthropic Sonnet 4.6 default; OpenAI / GLM via llm-adapter from council-diff#1).
representativeQueries: Should I raise a $1M seed or bootstrap?
Should I rewrite this service in Rust?
Is this a buy at 22x forward earnings?
Should we approve this loan with FICO 720, DTI 0.42, LTV 0.77?
Should I take the senior PM offer at a Series B or stay at FAANG?
